description: Developer who builds both customer-facing interfaces and backend infrastructure, managing the end-to-end data flow from client inputs to persistence.

junior.expectations: Focus on component updates, simple backend CRUD endpoints, style adjustments, and writing basic fetch callbacks.

mid.expectations: Implement full client-server integrations, design state sync mechanisms, build database entities, and configure client validation filters.

senior.expectations: Design client architecture (e.g. bundle size optimization), structure modular services, implement API caching protocols, and optimize client responsiveness.
